LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-05-2023 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO APPROVE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 25249.7(F)(4), WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED CONSISTENT WITH THE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND THE PARTIES' [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2023 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Continued To Jul-26-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion to approve settlement pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 25249.7(f)(4), which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Judgment shall be entered consistent with the Proposition 65 Settlement and the parties' [Proposed] Consent Judgment.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the Court's ruling.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
